slice_name: Tag a time entry with a label

tests.trace: set_label persists the additive label field on the existing time-entry record via C1 (CT2 extension, A14); StoreUnavailableError/ConstraintViolationError propagate unmodified — every assertion satisfied. Inherited CT2 base shape test NOT re-run (frozen, H14).

POST time-entries/<id>/label → _view_set_label resolves session via C2 (CT3) → C4.set_label persists label via C1 (CT2 extension) → label renders in list (AC11); label still holds value on reload, linked to same entry (AC13); failure: StoreUnavailableError propagates → 503, label not persisted.

visible.trace: freelancer sets label 'client-acme' on a time entry, saves → stored label field holds the text and renders on the entry in the list.

held_out.trace: same property with a DIFFERENT unguessable label text + entry → label persists + renders; not hardcoded to the visible label (B7).

visible.trace: after setting a label and navigating away, on return the entry's label field still holds the value, linked to the same time entry.

held_out.trace: same persist-across-reload property with a DIFFERENT unguessable label/entry → still holds; not hardcoded to the visible case (B7).

class_ext.note: feature-add — slice oracle materialized the MANDATORY scoped regression layer (BF4). See top-level regression block for the per-AC verdict.

nfr.note: slice nfr-mechanisms.json mechanisms == [] — label field is non-auth additive data; new_mechanisms == []; no M* requires a wiring check (MAP-NFR). NFR layer passes vacuously.

regression.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC2,AC7 (time-entry log + persistence, parent of the tagged entry) + integration_seam C1/CT2 (label additive on the time-entry record); NOT the whole inherited suite (Risk R4)

results.trace: log-a-time-entry suite still green: set_label is additive on the time-entry record; entry-logging path (create + list) unchanged by the label field.
time-entry persistence suite still green: the additive label field does not alter existing record persistence/read behavior — entries without a label still round-trip.

skeleton_fidelity.note: Slice ladder verified on the slice oracle (CT2-LABEL, F5, AC11/AC13) + scoped regression (AC2/AC7 by reference). No frozen skeleton test re-run/re-greened, no skeleton composition root edited, no baseline regression test mutated. Baseline untouched (H14/BF1).
